title: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: Had a meeting with the head of the Spanish Congress of Deputies, Francina Armengol. First of all, they discussed defense cooperation: air defense, development of the PURL and SAFE programs. We equally understand that Europe must be self-sufficient in protecting the sky from ballistics, drones and other threats. The Special Tribunal for the crime of aggression against Ukraine and efforts to return children abducted by Russia were also discussed in detail. Grateful...

title: Missile attack
description: Unpleasant news, but what can be done: monitors report that Russia is completing preparations for a massive missile-drone attack on Ukraine. Profiled publicists note that the enemy is completing the redeployment of a number of Tu-95MS/160 aircraft closer to Ukraine. There is a high probability that combat aircraft will take off in the next few days. The enemy can use: 🔹 up to 3x Tu-160; 🔹 up to 7 Tu-95MS; 🔹 moderate...

Большая вероятность, что боевая авиация вылетит уже в ближайшие несколько суток. Враг может применить: 🔹 до 3х Ту-160; 🔹 до 7 Ту-95МС; 🔹 умеренное...

title: Drone strike

During the final stage, various types of weapons, armored vehicles, aviation and unmanned systems were used. Fighters practiced hitting targets from the air, and Ukrainian drone operators demonstrated their practical combat...

Винищувачі відпрацьовували ураження цілей з повітря, а українські оператори дронів демонстрували свій практичний бойовий...
